steps.assistant_text: First-pseudo register-coloring cap retracted (was 'permuter-territory' 2026-06-20). Crack: (1) unnamed entry web — drop the named v1 head local, inline-deref a0[0x2B8/4] in the head condition and p128 def; the CSE'd compiler temp colors $v1 while a NAMED local forced the $a1 family (332B4 same-name-family converse). (2) Arm-local addiu remat — re-def p128 in the += arm via the int-cast address form (float*)((int)((int*)a0[0x2B8/4]) + 0x128); distinct expr tree defeats uopt expr-CSE vs the (char*)+0x128 head def, re-emitting addiu v0,v1,296. (3) Same-line join of re-def + compound '*p128 += D[0x374]' fixes lui-at/addiu pair order and f4/f6 FP pseudo numbering; compound += (not x=x+y) keeps *p128's pseudo created first.

metadata.verification: word-diff 51/51 vs raw .s + full make RUN_CC_CHECK=0 + cmp tenshoe.z64 baserom.z64 byte-identical
